problem id: 4dbb8138
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  01001101 -> 00000100
  01010011 -> 10000001
  00110111 -> 10000011
  11000000 -> 00000000
  00100110 -> 00000010
  00101011 -> 10000000
  01110101 -> 00000010

query: 00101000
predicted answer: 00000000
